description_long: This chest of drawers features a sturdy rectangular frame with a dark gray body and a contrasting medium-brown wooden top. The front showcases three spacious drawers, each adorned with two simple ring handles, providing both functionality and a touch of classic style. The sides are plain with recessed paneling, while the back is finished in a lighter wood tone and includes two small metal brackets near the top edge. The legs are short and slightly tapered, giving the piece a stable stance. The overall design is clean and understated, with subtle molding details around the drawer fronts. This piece would fit well in urban interiors, garages, or even as a repurposed storage unit in public spaces.
description: A dark gray chest of drawers with a brown wooden top, three drawers with ring handles, and subtle molding details. The design is classic and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with ring handles and decorative molding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain recessed panel and the brown wooden top.
description_view_2: Rear view with a lighter wood finish and two small metal brackets at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain recessed panel and brown wooden top.
